name: EVA Benchmark
description: Comprehensive evaluation framework for pathology foundation models covering patch-level classification, slide-level analysis, and segmentation tasks.

name: PathBench
description: Large-scale benchmark for pathology foundation models across 229 tasks including classification, OS prediction, DFS prediction, and DSS prediction.

name: Stanford PathBench
description: Comprehensive benchmark evaluating 31 foundation models across 41 tasks from TCGA, CPTAC, and external datasets.

name: HEST-Benchmark
description: Spatial transcriptomics benchmark evaluating gene expression prediction from H&E images across 9 cancer types.

name: Patho-Bench
description: Comprehensive benchmark from Mahmood Lab evaluating foundation models across molecular prediction, TME characterization, grading, survival, and treatment response tasks.

name: Sinai SSL Tile Benchmarks
description: Comprehensive benchmark from Mount Sinai evaluating pathology foundation models on cancer detection and biomarker prediction tasks across multiple organs and institutions.

name: STAMP Benchmark
description: Nature Biomedical Engineering benchmark evaluating 15 foundation models as feature extractors for weakly supervised computational pathology across morphology, biomarker, and prognosis tasks.

name: THUNDER Benchmark
description: Comprehensive benchmark evaluating pathology foundation models across KNN classification, linear probing, few-shot learning, segmentation, calibration, and adversarial robustness tasks.

name: PathoROB
description: Robustness benchmark evaluating pathology foundation models across domain shift scenarios including TCGA 2x2 splits, Camelyon, and Tolkach ESCA datasets.

name: PLISM Benchmark
description: Robustness benchmark from Owkin evaluating embedding consistency across scanners and staining variations using cosine similarity and top-10 retrieval accuracy.
